name: rug-code-architecture
mission: Review ~/projects/rug-scanner architecture and code quality. Read ALL source files. Check: Is the Hono app properly structured? Is error handling consistent? Does Promise.allSettled degradation work correctly? Is the scorer logic sound (threshold-based verdicts)? Are types comprehensive? Is the cache layer correct (TTL, key format, invalidation)? Are there any circular dependencies? Is the x402 middleware configured correctly? Rate overall code quality 1-10 with specific issues.
